novel_features.name: Stale opportunity report
novel_features.description: Find opportunities sitting in a stage longer than N days, using synthesized stage-entry timestamps from sync history.

novel_features.name: Pipeline funnel snapshot
novel_features.description: Stage-by-stage count and total monetary value for a pipeline, output as TSV ready to paste into a dashboard sheet.

novel_features.name: Custom field name resolver
novel_features.description: Translate human-readable custom field names into opaque GHL IDs, with did-you-mean suggestions on typos.

novel_features.name: Bulk tag from stdin
novel_features.description: Apply or remove a tag across many contacts read from stdin, with chunked 100-at-a-time delivery and connection-drop retry.

novel_features.name: SQL on local cache
novel_features.description: Run read-only SQL against the local SQLite mirror of contacts, opportunities, pipelines, stages, tags, custom_fields, conversations, messages, and appointments.

novel_features.name: Contact dedup with richness scoring
novel_features.description: Group contacts by lowercased email and E.164 phone, score by filled-field count and recency, emit a merge plan.

novel_features.name: Engagement decay alert
novel_features.description: Find opportunities in a stage whose contacts have had no inbound or outbound messages in N days.

novel_features.name: Hot follow-up scorecard
novel_features.description: Rank recruits by a composite of production signals, engagement, and recruit-tag count.

novel_features.name: Multi-location config and flag
novel_features.description: Named profiles for each GHL sub-account (KWCP, THINK), with --location flag honored across every command.

novel_features.name: Doctor
novel_features.description: Validate the PIT token (auto-lowercases the prefix), ping the active location, and report local cache state.

novel_features.name: Conversation thread reconstruction
novel_features.description: Reconstruct a chronological SMS+email+call thread for a single contact from the local messages table.
